name: MCB / Mini Circuit Breaker Lockout
shortDescription: Pin-type lockout that clips over a single MCB toggle to block re-energising.
longDescription: Clips directly over an individual MCB toggle switch, blocking it from being flipped back on until the padlock threaded through it is removed. Available in pin-in and pin-out styles to suit different breaker toggle designs, and in single units, sets of 2, or combo packs covering multiple breaker types on one distribution board.

images.alt: MCB / Mini Circuit Breaker Lockout supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Pack options
specs.value: Single, set of 2, combo set of 3–8
